system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee with Spear
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You grip your spear in one hand and whirl it around your head, causing the tip to glow, strik ing enemies within your reach with great force, and releasing a blast of energy that damages enemies in a larger area. Make a Melee Skill roll against the Parry of everyone within a 20-foot radius per Rank in Waijia. On a Success, the Attack strikes everyone who is within reach of your spear for 4d10 Open Damage. Addi tionally, everyone else in the affected area is hit with a lesser energy blast that deals 1d10 Damage. Cathartic: The effects are the same except the lesser energy blast portion of the Attack does 4d10 closed Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: The effects are the same except the lesser energy blast portion of the Attack does 4d10 closed Damage.
